label: Modification - landing page copy tweak
promptText: Modify the existing homepage hero copy to sound more premium without changing the offer, CTA, or layout.

questions.label: What should the next prompt lock down first?
questions.helper: Pick the first thing the next prompt should make explicit.

questions.label: What should the starter include next?
questions.helper: Choose the next thing the answer should include.

answers.answer: Do not rewrite the CTA or promise.
